2605.29649.title: LLM-Evolved Domain-Independent Heuristics for Symbolic AI Planning
2605.29649.paper_summary: Heuristic search is the dominant paradigm in symbolic AI planning, and the strongest heuristics are the result of decades of work by planning researchers. Recent work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can design heuristics for individual planning domains, but no LLM-generated heuristic has so far worked on arbitrary planning tasks. In this paper, we use evolutionary search to produce the first LLM-generated domain-independent heuristics that exceed the hand-engineered state of the art. We let an LLM mutate parent heuristics written in C++, store candidates in a MAP-Elites archive keyed on informedness and speed and calculate fitness scores by blending coverage with solving time. To place the evolved programs in context, we additionally benchmark a broad set of hand-engineered heuristics on their informedness-speed tradeoff, which to our knowledge has not been done before. On unseen testing domains, our best evolved heuristic solves more tasks than even the strongest baseline, with our full heuristic suite spanning the Pareto frontier of said tradeoff. We also find that seeding evolution from the trivial blind heuristic outperforms seeding from the strong FF heuristic, even when the resulting program is itself an FF variant, and that LLM reasoning effort affects how often candidates compile much more than the quality of those that do. Because the evolved programs are plain C++, they slot into existing planners as drop-in replacements and inherit the soundness and completeness guarantees of the underlying search.
2605.29649.paper_summary_zh: 啟發式搜尋是符號人工智慧規劃中的主導範式，而最強的啟發式方法是規劃研究人員經過數十年努力的結果。最近的研究顯示，大型語言模型（LLMs）可以為個別規劃領域設計啟發式方法，但到目前為止，尚未有LLM生成的啟發式方法能在任意規劃任務上運作。在本文中，我們使用進化搜尋來產生第一個超越手工設計的最先進水平的LLM生成的領域獨立啟發式方法。我們讓LLM變異用C++編寫的父啟發式，將候選者存儲在以知識性和速度為鍵的MAP-Elites檔案中，並通過將覆蓋率與解決時間混合來計算適應度分數。為了將進化的程序放在上下文中，我們還基準測試了一組廣泛的手工設計啟發式方法，評估其知識性與速度的權衡，據我們所知，這在之前並未進行過。在未見過的測試領域中，我們最佳的進化啟發式方法解決的任務數量超過了最強基準，即使我們的完整啟發式套件也跨越了上述權衡的Pareto邊界。我們還發現，從平凡的盲啟發式開始進化的效果優於從強大的FF啟發式開始，即使最終的程序本身是FF變體，並且LLM推理的努力影響候選者的編譯頻率，遠超過那些能夠編譯的質量。由於進化的程序是純C++，它們可以作為即插即用的替代品融入現有的規劃器，並繼承底層搜尋的健全性和完整性保證。
2605.29649.author: Elliot Gestrin et.al.
